title: Political Science and International Relations (English) Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Political Science and International Relations (English) Program Learning Outcomes

To have advanced knowledge about the basic theories and practices of Political Science and International Relations (Knowledge)

Having knowledge about global, regional and national problems and transformations (Knowledge)

To be able to use the knowledge about the field in decision making, decision implementation and behavior (Skills)

Having the ability to analyze and evaluate the developments in Political Science and International Relations in the context of power distribution in the international system, national and international law in order to monitor, understand, interpret and make future plans (Skills)

To have the awareness of fulfilling the duties and responsibilities undertaken (Competencies - Ability to Work Independently and Take Responsibility Competency)

Transferring the knowledge and skills acquired in Political Science and International Relations in written and oral form (Competencies - Communication and Social Competence)

To be able to follow the information in the field of political science and international relations and communicate with colleagues by using a foreign language at least at the European Language Portfolio B1 General Level (Skills)

Having the ability to share knowledge and learn together (Competencies-Learning Competency)

Being sensitive to ethics, participation, social responsibility, social and universal values in the process of formation of knowledge and experience related to the field (Competencies-Specific Competence)

To be able to solve a problem related to Political Science and International Relations in a team or independently (Competencies - Ability to Work Independently and Take Responsibility)

To provide continuous development with the awareness that learning continues throughout life (Competencies - Learning Competency)

Designing, conducting, publishing and/or reporting original academic research in the field (Skills)

Directing his/her education to a further education level in the same field or to a profession at the same level (Competencies-Learning competence)
